mustSupport: Benchmark fixtures and holdout discipline come before prompt polish.
False archive is more important than cosmetic overall score gains.
Experiments should be compared case by case with explicit regressions.
Python should remain an analysis layer rather than the runtime source of truth.

criticalChecks: Do not treat bilingual wording as a reason to send this batch to inbox.
Do not merge the Python boundary statement into the main eval cluster if the model can separate it cleanly.
annotationNotes: The core challenge here is language mixing, not link density or noise.
A one-line Python note is allowed to become its own cluster because it states a stable architectural boundary.
